display.purpose: High-level module landing page headers only.

body.purpose: Dashboard cells, labels, forms, and general content.

shadows.name: console-elevation
shadows.purpose: Only used for transient UI elements like the absolute BAPI Console drawer.

motion.name: fade-standard
motion.purpose: Used for page loading transitions and modal animations.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Standard call-to-action button with crisp corners and classic steel blue color.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #004080; color: #ffffff; padding: 8px 16px; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; border: none; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s ease, transform 0.1s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #0a6ed1; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98); }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Standard text input field with high contrast borders and sharp corners.
components.css: .ds-input-field { background: #ffffff; color: #1c1c1c; border: 1px solid #d2d5d8; border-radius: 2px; padding: 4px 8px; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; height: 2rem; outline: none; width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; transition: border-color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s; } .ds-input-field:focus { border-color: #2563eb; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px #2563eb; }

components.name: Card Container
components.description: Flat card container with clear borders separating content panels.
components.html:
Purchase Order PO-2026-0001

Status: Acknowledged. Expected delivery in 3 days.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #d2d5d8; border-radius: 4px; padding: 16px; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; } .ds-card-title { font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; color: #1c1c1c; margin: 0 0 8px 0; } .ds-card-body { font-size: 0.875rem; color: #555555; margin: 0; }

narrative.overview: VendorConnect is an industrial-strength self-service portal for Indian manufacturing procurement. Its visual system reflects structural reliability, operational transparency, and high efficiency. Rejecting the overly rounded, low-contrast, soft-shadow conventions of standard SaaS tools, VendorConnect utilizes crisp grid lines, high-contrast typography, and a compact layout density inspired by classic enterprise SAP Fiori screens but reimagined for a modern React environment.
keyCharacteristics: Crisp borders and sharp corners (4px standard radius) instead of heavy pill rounded elements.
Clean grid lines and high contrast (≥4.5:1 text contrast) for readability.
Clear BAPI/RFC payload representation to enforce transparency.
A restrained, steel-blue color foundation offset by purposeful status highlights.

rules.name: The Steel Border Rule
rules.body: Grid lines and division borders are explicit and visible (1px, #d2d5d8). Never use shadows to suggest boundary divisions; use concrete lines to structure layout cells.

rules.name: The Amber Highlight Rule
rules.body: Mapped black hover interactions and borders must transition cleanly to Amber-500 (#f59e0b) to provide high-visibility state signals.

rules.name: The Flat Canvas Rule
rules.body: Surfaces must remain flat and flush against the background (#f0f4f8) at rest. Drop shadows must only be utilized for transient UI layers (e.g. active dropdown menus, absolute payload consoles) to indicate modal layering.

dos: Do use explicit 1px borders (#d2d5d8) to separate table cells, headers, and dashboard blocks.
Do ensure all input fields maintain standard 2rem heights and sharp corners for fast keyboard navigation.
Do label BAPI log capsules with distinct semantic color badges (Emerald for Success, Red for Failure).
donts: Don't use decorative purple/violet gradients or neon accents.
Don't use card shadows at rest; keep layouts flat to align with Fiori density principles.
Don't use fuzzy low-contrast light gray typography; keep text colors at High-Contrast Gray (#1c1c1c) or higher.
